analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: The source data file (41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx) does not contain a 'Fig 5c' sheet, and no qPCR-style GLI1 expression data for HSC1λ-gGFP vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1 is available in any of the provided supplementary files. The 'Fig 5a' sheet contains only the text 'PTCH1' in a single cell (A53) with no numeric data. The 'Fig 5d' sheet is effectively empty (contains only a single letter 'F' at M37). The other Fig 5 sheets provided contain different assays: Fig 5b = cell proliferation counts, Fig 5e = ipNF06.2A proliferation, Fig 5g = HSC1λ soft agar colony counts, Fig 5h = HSC1λ transwell migration, Fig 5i = ipNF06.2A transwell migration, Fig 5j = PTCH1 expression across MPNST cell lines (HSC, S462TY, STS-26T, T265, S462), Fig 5l = xenograft survival. None of these contain GLI1 qPCR data for HSC1λ-gGFP vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1. Therefore a numeric fold change cannot be computed from the provided data.
denominator_used: N/A -- no numeric GLI1 qPCR values for HSC1λ-gGFP vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1 are present in the provided source data workbook.
assumptions_made: Assumed MOESM10_ESM.xlsx is the source data file; inspected all sheets including Fig 5a, Fig 5b, Fig 5d, Fig 5e, Fig 5g, Fig 5h, Fig 5i, Fig 5j, Fig 5l (no 'Fig 5c' sheet exists); also inspected MOESM4, MOESM6, MOESM7, MOESM8 for any HSC1λ GLI1 qPCR content (none found); only qPCR-like data in MOESM10 are Fig 5a's empty sheet (title 'PTCH1' only) and Fig 5j which covers PTCH1 (not GLI1) across 5 cell lines.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Source data file: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx
   - Sheets present: 'Fig 1b', 'Fig 1f+g', 'Fig 3c', 'Fig 3f', 'Fig 5a', 'Fig 5b', 'Fig 5d', 'Fig 5e', 'Fig 5g', 'Fig 5h', 'Fig 5i', 'Fig 5j', 'Fig 5l'.
   - NO 'Fig 5c' sheet is present in the workbook.
   - Also loaded MOESM4 (Clinical Data), MOESM6 (DE gene tables), MOESM7 (drug class info), MOESM8 (fusion catalog). None contain qPCR GLI1 data for HSC1λ-gGFP vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Target: qPCR GLI1 expression measurements in HSC1λ-gGFP (control) vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1 (PTCH1 CRISPR knockout), from Fig 5c.
   - Not found in any supplementary file provided.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Expected: GLI1 relative expression values (e.g., 2^(-ΔΔCt)) per biological replicate per condition.
   - None of the Fig 5 sheets expose such values.
   - Inventory of Fig 5 sheet contents:
     * Fig 5a: single cell A53 = 'PTCH1' only; no numeric values.
     * Fig 5b: HSC1λ-gGFP vs HSC1λ-gPTCH1 proliferation time course (cells over 0-120 hrs), not qPCR of GLI1.
     * Fig 5d: single stray cell 'F' at M37; sheet is empty of data.
     * Fig 5e: ipNF06.2A / ipNF06.2A-gGFP / ipNF06.2A-gPTCH1 proliferation time course; not GLI1 qPCR.
     * Fig 5g: HSC1λ soft agar colony counts (gGFP = 0 across all 8 rows; gPTCH1 = 132, 141, 127, 131, 129, 123, 115, 106).
     * Fig 5h: HSC1λ transwell migration counts (gGFP = 0; gPTCH1 = 81, 87, 101, 102, 77, 65, 47, 65).
     * Fig 5i: ipNF06.2A transwell migration counts.
     * Fig 5j: PTCH1 expression across cell lines HSC, S462TY, STS-26T, T265, S462 (note: PTCH1, not GLI1).
     * Fig 5l: xenograft survival (S462TY, STS-26T with vehicle vs sonidegib).
   - MOESM6 contains GLI1 values, but those are log2FC from bulk/scRNA-seq DE comparisons, not qPCR of the HSC1λ-gPTCH1 engineered line vs HSC1λ-gGFP.

D. COMPUTATION
   - Intended: mean(HSC1λ-gPTCH1 GLI1 qPCR) / mean(HSC1λ-gGFP GLI1 qPCR) = fold change; two-sample t-test on replicate values.
   - Cannot execute because the per-replicate GLI1 qPCR values for the two conditions are not in the provided data.

E. RESULT
   - Fold change: not computable from the provided source data.
   - DATA_UNAVAILABLE.

F. CAVEATS
   - Fig 5c source data may not have been deposited in MOESM10 even though the paper states these values exist; it is also possible the data were meant to be in the empty Fig 5a or Fig 5d sheets (both of which are effectively blank in this workbook).
   - No other provided file (MOESM4, MOESM5 [raw EPIC methylation/similar], MOESM6, MOESM7, MOESM8, or the GSE RAW/series files) contains qPCR of GLI1 in the HSC1λ-gPTCH1 line.
   - Without the underlying per-replicate Ct or relative-expression values, neither the fold change nor its associated statistics (SD, p-value) can be computed with the provided inputs.
